S.FORM: Orbie Bowling sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1939, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Orbie Bowling, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: orβie βowliŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, orβie βowliŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Orbie Bowling sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1939, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Orbie Bowling, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
